description: Open the Landsat multi-spectral image at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Place five labeled pins at the following pixel (X, Y) coordinates: Plot_A (30, 25), Plot_B (100, 80), Plot_C (150, 50), Plot_D (60, 120), and Plot_E (200, 100). Export the pin data, including spectral band values, to /home/ga/snap_exports/ground_truth_pins.txt. Save the product with the embedded pins in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_with_pins.dim.
